name: grelin-client-onboarding
description: Grelin Health — Enterprise Client Onboarding & Tracking Platform

scripts.clean: node -e "for (const d of ['.next', '.next-dev', 'out']) require('fs').rmSync(d, { recursive: true, force: true })"

//browserslist: Without this, autoprefixer used its default target and emitted backdrop-filter with no -webkit- prefix, so every blur silently did nothing on Safari < 18 (desktop and iOS). Naming Safari/iOS 15 explicitly keeps the prefixes.
